lines.speaker: Guildmaster
lines.text: This is the Champions' Guild. Only adventurers who have proved themselves worthy by gaining influence from quests are allowed in here.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster
lines.text: Let me see what you've got there. Ah, yes, one of the champions. Just head downstairs and you'll find your challenge waiting in the arena. Hand that scroll to the doorman to get in.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster
lines.text: I think you've already got a key. Maybe you should check your key ring.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster
lines.text: I think you've already got a key somewhere.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster
lines.text: You have not proved yourself worthy to enter here yet.

lines.speaker: Guildmaster
lines.text: Greetings bold adventurer. Welcome to the guild of Champions.
